transcript.clean_text: after a sprint day the tour de france would return to the mountains legendary mountains this time with naido quintana tarepogacha and the rest hoping to conquer the legendary mulvane 2 not once but twice for the first time ever in the tour de france stage the giant of promos would be climbed on two occasions on the same day from two different sides the classic bedoir side for the final time but no summit finish a descent to malozen and a finish there for the first time after 199 kilometers after the first 20 to 30 kilometers we'd already had lots of action unfortunately of the unfortunate kind for tony martin he had to abandon the race as did several others as julian alaphilippe was ripping it up at the front groups of other riders tried to join him dan martin and the rest in the days breakaway watfornat and a few others would also come along and do that craig van avermaet would be with him balkamolamer there too as the ineos grenadiers went to work behind the mighty mountain just about coming into sight for the first time on the first of two ascents the so-called easier side from salt 22 kilometers long julian ala philippe went over the top and took the maximum points in the king of the mountains competition naido quintana still led that but he'd already been dropped as had david gaudu suffering in the heat tenth on general classification he would slip down onto the final ascent of vantu and kenny ellison attacked one of three riders there for trek segafredo balka monomer left behind ala philippe with him ellie saw reached by walt fernart but that two at the front wouldn't last long the belgian national champion 24 hours after coming second in a bunch sprint was leading a mountain stage he was leading by four and a half minutes with the yellow jersey group behind ben o'connor beginning to suffer just days after his own alpine show today's entertainment laid on by walt fernart when mikhailski became the last domestic for richard karapas to move off the first attacks happened the main one coming from jonas vinegar in the white jersey looking after it for today bogaty the yellow jersey did react but then showed the first sign of cracking stage 11 of the tour and a weakness maybe for the defending champion the young dane vingagor would extend the lead he'd take 30 seconds over the top getting there and conserving his lead looking like he was on his way to a stage when he'd be able to celebrate inside the last two kilometers from cyclo cross to classics to bunch sprints and now mighty mountain stages a demonstration of superiority from watford art and rescuing what's been a difficult tour for his team yong bovisma the trek sega fredo pairing of ellie sand and molomo a second and third vingagor was caught by pogaca uran and karapas no differences there no time bonuses left either pogaccha coming across not having lost time but having shown a crack what bernard said it might well have been his greatest ever victory i think we'd be inclined to agree with him fanart ellison monamer five time lost for the likes of mass finishing at three minutes and two seconds down a battle between the young guns on the mountain maybe a sign of things to come with 10 stages left in the tour de france bogata still leads for now though and with ben o'connor having slipped from second to fifth now leading by five minutes and 18 as rigoberto ran moved to second and wingo was now on the podium stage is coming thick and fast watch out for the wind leaving sample 2 and heading to neem 160 kilometers a short day one may be difficult to control depending on the terrain are there the legs and the freshness for the sprint teams to control it's an unpredictable day ahead but aren't they all on the tour de france bulgacho showing a little weakness what for not putting on a show you
